sources.label: Sina Finance - 300024 company announcements (latest filings: routine auditor reappointment, no June 6-9 material items)
Eastmoney Caifuhao - Feb 2026 JAC/Lingyun Giens bid wins (pre-window, last notable contract news)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6 and the stock was flat today (0.0%), so there is nothing new to act on beyond yesterday's hold; the rank already improved to #12 recently and chasing further without fresh commercialization evidence would violate rerating discipline. The -14.6% YTD de-rating with the China-robotics-scale thesis intact keeps asymmetry mildly favorable, justifying a small positive drift rather than a move.
verdicts.bull: A $3.7B pure-play Builder with state-backed positioning in China's industrial/humanoid robotics buildout, trading -14.6% YTD - de-rated, under-owned by foreign investors, and still landing auto-sector bid wins (JAC, Lingyun Giens).
verdicts.neutral: The cleaner read-through remains China robotics scale rather than a single humanoid product; with no new orders or guidance since June 6 and a flat tape, the setup is unchanged from yesterday.
verdicts.bear: TTM net margin is roughly -11% with sell-side sentiment at strong-sell; without a step-change in order flow the name stays a chronically unprofitable SOE-adjacent integrator, and humanoid hype cycles can de-rate it further.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A sizeable disclosed humanoid or automotive automation order book win, or H1 2026 results showing margin inflection.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued losses and weak order momentum confirming the strong-sell consensus, with humanoid-theme rotation pulling flows to higher-purity names.
